programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: Reigning Titans Joe Thomas and Dani Speegle are one victory away from advancing to the Titan Games Championship but standing in their way are six top competitors from the Central Region who have one last shot at redemption. The contenders must face off in a brand-new three-way battle before advancing to a classic head-to-head competition. The last competitors standing must defeat Thomas and Speegle on Mt. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! programme.desc: Tony’s been kidnapped..by Sudarikov! The rest of the team must break into the plane where Tony’s being held and rescue him – all while 30,000 feet in the air!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

Now they’re trapped underwater and must defend themselves against falling torpedoes, AI enemy submarines, and their most dangerous foe yet: the sea! Cisco takes command of the hauler-turned-sub, waging a daring underwater battle.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony realizes he’s lost his ability to drive! With the team stranded on a deserted island in the South Pacific and enemies rapidly approaching (including Scandan), the team tries to rehab Tony’s driving in order to get them all to safety.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The students are assigned to care for flour babies in Health Class but must worry more than just their grades after discovering a Gruesome lurking in Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After Steve discovers “monsters” could be lurking under Arcadia, he allies with Eli to investigate

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When the crew gets stuck on a sheet of thin ice, they run into a group of Picktools, which appear to be trying to crack the ice around them.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Accidental Hero In order to win the Fright Stuff Award, Casper consults his uncles for scaring advice. Rich Kid Ra When Ra pulls up to Scare School in a solid gold chariot, everyone suddenly wants to be his best friend.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Dragon Quest The unlucky staff of a medieval-themed restaurant in Deedstown, get an unfriendly visit from Professor Thurdigree Burns. Opposite Day When Wolfie's experiment with moonlight goes awry, everyone but Casper turns into his or her opposite.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Ming is hurt when Rupert and friends appear to prefer Bill's new toy dragon to her. But when the toy gets them lost in the woods they discover there are some things that only a real dragon can do.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: With the sun low in the sky, Rupert waves to Ping Pong, Bill, Edward and Ming as they join him at his cottage. They are all going to stay up late to see something very special – an eclipse of the moon. Bill is just explaining what an eclipse is when Raggety arrives. In his impatience, he does not want to wait for the moon to rise. He wants to see it straight away. Raggety does elf magic to see the moon at once but promptly vanishes. The others think he is playing a trick and hiding from them, but when Bill looks through the telescope, keen to see the start of the eclipse he gets a shock. Raggety has got his wish to see the moon. His magic has taken him there! How will Rupert and friends get him back down before the eclipse shrinks the moon down to nothing? It is a race against time to save their little elf friend.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex is mistaken for a Maine Coon and takes over that cat’s life in the penthouse. At first, VERY comfortable with his shmancy new life, Alex grows to miss his old life and learns that it’s lonely at the top.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: On Junior Marshals’ Day at the fire station, Melman gets stuck in a firetruck on its way to a real emergency. With Alex’s help, Melman must overcome his fear of heights to help save a stuck cat, and learn that even heroes get scared sometimes.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria meets a shy hermit crab, named Starlene, with a secret talent of tap dancing, Gloria plans a flashy production for Starlene’s debut so she can share her talent with the world! But Gloria doesn’t ask Starlene what she wants, and pushes the crab’s introverted self too far, ultimately learning you have to respect your shy friends' comfort levels they may be different than yours.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a snowstorm blocks Kate from accessing the zoo, Melman decides to become “substitute Kate” and make sure the animals are cared for. But when the animals go wild in the snow, Melman’s future-paramedic skills are put to the test during an outbreak of stubbed toes and boo-boos. A series of stumbles makes Melman question whether he’s cut out to be a paramedic--until he learns that mastering a goal takes grit!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse is immersed in imaginative Wild West play with Sheriff Gabby, Sheriff Pandy, and CatRat the Bandit. Sheriff Gabby and Sheriff Pandy must safely deliver gold to the bank, but it gets confiscated by Bandit CatRat! They go on an adventure to get the gold back and restore order in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby brings DJ Catnip a microphone for him to use in the big music show, but he has some terrible news: he lost his groove! Determined to help him get his groove back, Gabby and Pandy take him on a musical search through the dollhouse. As they go, Gabby uses the microphone to record sounds from the Gabby Cats’ everyday activities that culminate into a new song that gets DJ his groove back just in time for the show! In our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Gabby sings a song!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple and Winger each injure a wing while they're with Dak, and only teamwork can get them home. At the roost, Cutter gets stuck in a puddle of goo.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders have a "Dragon Day" to show their skills to a young fan, but Aggro skips it to hang out with her new fun -- but reckless -- friends.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: When Peabody gets carried away trying to create the perfect band using historical friends, Sherman must stop him from becoming a music monster

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: After hearing a prediction that the world will end during the show, Sherman panics and Peabody must take control of the apocalypse situation

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Eugene’s bond with Webmaster is put to the test when Webmaster leaves the group for a pack of Deathgrippers.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom sets out to prove Sledkin caused an explosion that injured a dragon in the Hidden World.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien tries to get rid of his parents, but when evil Karl traps them in the Love Gauntlet they must prove their family's strength to survive.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: After making a bet against Uncle King Julien, King Julien must win the "Jungle Games" in order to maintain control of the royal crown.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss misses the old days adventuring with his buddy Jack Sprat. Fearful he will leave San Lorenzo, Dulcinea concocts a super special adventure surprise with the orphans. But Jack Sprat shows up with the promise of a damsel in distress… who turns out to be a super scary monster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Puss and Dulcinea embark on an adventure to find the Fountain of Youth to save Puss' old mentor, El Guante Blanco.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: During the week of the Midnight Sun where the sun doesn't set for a week, Hiccup must deal with sleep deprivation and a dangerous new dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and the Riders, with help from Dagur hatch a plan to steal Berk's gold back.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Eruptodon can't take its egg into the Great Volcano, Hiccup and Fishlegs must go into the dangerous volcano with the egg before it's too late.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug overhears Thunk accidentally call Phil "Dad", he tries to reconnect with Thunk by taking him to the natural spectacle known as "Big Shine."

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil invents a simple new game called ball-in-cup, everyone except Hope, can't stop playing it. But just when Hope thinks she's rid the farm of the game, she finds herself addicted to the game worst of all.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Grug thinks his forehead looks too big in Ugga's family portrait, she strives to make the painting disappear.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss accidentally sells Tim's favorite Football Mike toy at a family yard sale, he shirks his duties as a CEO to try to get it back. But the villains pick up on his one weakness, his brother, and so begins a game of elaborate keep-away.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The combined villains have taken over Baby Corp HQ, and a disastrous chupie teleportation accident has all the office babies scattered to the wind. Boss has to regain his leadership gusto to convince Baby Corp to regroup, as Tim and Danny share an emotional last day together before Danny leaves town for good.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: With the Baby Corp babies exiled from their office and hiding in the Templeton basement, Boss and a trusted team storm Baby Corp to take it back from the villains. Having decided to retire and pass the CEO-ship onto to Staci, he also prepares Tim for her new life as an older brother to just a normal baby brother.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: The Sky Torcher & Flame Throwers invade the Crystal Realm. Tom must conquer his demons and bond with the Fault Ripper to defeat the Sky Torcher.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders discover the Ice Realm and find Buzzsaw inside.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Alex and Eugene find themselves at odds with Tom and their fellow dragon riders when Feathers and Webmaster go missing during a blizzard in the Ice Realm.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony’s been kidnapped..by Sudarikov! The rest of the team must break into the plane where Tony’s being held and rescue him – all while 30,000 feet in the air!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team manages to rescue Tony, but not before Sudarikov sends their plane crashing into the ocean. Now they’re trapped underwater and must defend themselves against falling torpedoes, AI enemy submarines, and their most dangerous foe yet: the sea! Cisco takes command of the hauler-turned-sub, waging a daring underwater battle.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony realizes he’s lost his ability to drive! With the team stranded on a deserted island in the South Pacific and enemies rapidly approaching (including Scandan), the team tries to rehab Tony’s driving in order to get them all to safety.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: The students are assigned to care for flour babies in Health Class but must worry more than just their grades after discovering a Gruesome lurking in Arcadia

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After Steve discovers “monsters” could be lurking under Arcadia, he allies with Eli to investigate

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim and his friends are trapped in detention while tensions in Trollmarket escalate with fears of Gunmar's escape

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja attends her first teem party, Krel goes hunting for an urban legend with Eli, but the kids' fun is ruined when the Zeron Brotherhood crash their night. Meanwhile, Vex receives a message from Akiridion-5.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In the flipside of Trollhunters Ep. 222, Aja and Krel embark on a journey with Jim, Toby, and Claire, who Krel believes are the Zeron Brotherhood in disguise. Meanwhile, Aja’s missing Serrtaor embarks on a journey of its own.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Aja and Krel learn a secret, military base may house an alien spacecraft, they enlist Stuart to help them infilitrate it. Meanwhile, General Morando unviels his latest weapon - Omen, a deadly, cyborg assassin.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: When the crew gets stuck on a sheet of thin ice, they run into a group of Picktools, which appear to be trying to crack the ice around them.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Accidental Hero In order to win the Fright Stuff Award, Casper consults his uncles for scaring advice. Rich Kid Ra When Ra pulls up to Scare School in a solid gold chariot, everyone suddenly wants to be his best friend.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Dragon Quest The unlucky staff of a medieval-themed restaurant in Deedstown, get an unfriendly visit from Professor Thurdigree Burns. Opposite Day When Wolfie's experiment with moonlight goes awry, everyone but Casper turns into his or her opposite.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Ming is hurt when Rupert and friends appear to prefer Bill's new toy dragon to her. But when the toy gets them lost in the woods they discover there are some things that only a real dragon can do.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: With the sun low in the sky, Rupert waves to Ping Pong, Bill, Edward and Ming as they join him at his cottage. They are all going to stay up late to see something very special – an eclipse of the moon. Bill is just explaining what an eclipse is when Raggety arrives. In his impatience, he does not want to wait for the moon to rise. He wants to see it straight away. Raggety does elf magic to see the moon at once but promptly vanishes. The others think he is playing a trick and hiding from them, but when Bill looks through the telescope, keen to see the start of the eclipse he gets a shock. Raggety has got his wish to see the moon. His magic has taken him there! How will Rupert and friends get him back down before the eclipse shrinks the moon down to nothing? It is a race against time to save their little elf friend.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex is mistaken for a Maine Coon and takes over that cat’s life in the penthouse. At first, VERY comfortable with his shmancy new life, Alex grows to miss his old life and learns that it’s lonely at the top.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: On Junior Marshals’ Day at the fire station, Melman gets stuck in a firetruck on its way to a real emergency. With Alex’s help, Melman must overcome his fear of heights to help save a stuck cat, and learn that even heroes get scared sometimes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Mr. Tanaka is moving places all by himself, so Team Zenko step in to assist, and learn the importance of asking people for help. / When Sam's skateboard competition falls on the same day as her favourite creator Ken KaBlam's comic book signing, TZG secretly prevents him leaving town before she gets the chance to meet him.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Gloria meets a shy hermit crab, named Starlene, with a secret talent of tap dancing, Gloria plans a flashy production for Starlene’s debut so she can share her talent with the world! But Gloria doesn’t ask Starlene what she wants, and pushes the crab’s introverted self too far, ultimately learning you have to respect your shy friends' comfort levels they may be different than yours.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When their favorite zoo visitor loses his teddy bear, our gang goes on a wild adventure through New York City to return it to him - and in the process Marty learns that some things in life can't be found in an instruction manual.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family’s estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves stars in 47 Ronin, an epic fantasy where an outcast joins samurai on a quest for vengeance and honor against a ruthless overlord in ancient Japan.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: The Man With the Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben’s gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: 47 Ronin

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe at Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Mask of Shura of Fire Cloud
programme.desc: 18 years ago, the evil Black Feather clan infiltrated the territory of Master Fire Cloud and stole The Mask of Shura, thus releasing an evil spirit that was a baby. Master Fire Cloud adopted the baby to prevent him from becoming evil. When the baby grows up, he takes control of the mask and becomes Fire Cloud’s successor as the city’s guard.

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: Agent Wen is assigned to work undercover for a Southeast Asian arms dealer to locate and destroy a cache of munitions. However, when he finally finds them, he is attacked by unknown gangsters and must team up with his partner to recover the weapons and prevent a disaster.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Bride with the White Hair
programme.desc: Tianshan disciple Yu Luo Sha challenges the four major sects and slays their leaders, shaking the martial world. Zhuo Yihang confronts her but falls in love. When he is set to marry another, she turns white-haired and vows never to meet again.

programme.title: Extreme Ends

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: Gabbi's longtime friend, Kimberly Stark, is selling her home. But the morning after the very first open house, her broker, Joe Parillo, is found dead in her foyer. Naturally, Kim turns to Gabbi for help.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today, we'll explore a house where, if the perfect wooden furniture isn’t available, the couple takes matters into their own hands, creating their own pieces, making it feel like a cozy café.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Inspired by an emotional video documenting their MasterChef journeys, the contestants must bring a dish that best represents who they are now as they come back to win.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: MasterChef royalty Peter Gilmore is in the house with a Mystery Box packed with ingredients from some of his signature dishes, from the world-famous Snow Egg to the decadent Chocolate Ethereal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Australia’s undisputed Queen of Chocolate, Kirsten Tibballs, joins the MasterChef kitchen for the first pressure test of the series. She challenges the contestants with her toughest recipe yet.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S1)
programme.desc: Pad Thai is a crowd favourite, and less intimidating to make than you might think. This recipe literally takes minutes, so Rachael makes the dish twice, with shrimp and with chicken.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo goes beneath it all to find five of the most unusual dining adventures below and beyond! Dive down twenty feet under the sea for North Atlantic seafood in Norway.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Be it savoury or sweet, Taro is one of the key ingredients that characterises Taiwanese cuisine. Learn more about how this classic Taiwanese dish honours the tradition and terroir.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Buddha Jumps Over the Wall is a classic stew in the Mandarin-speaking world. Learn more about the cultural significance of Buddha Jumps Over the Wall in Taiwan and all the culinary techniques involved.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a classic German dish of smothered chicken meatballs and spaetzle, inspired by the traditional Southern meal of chicken and dumplings.

programme.desc: Ross becomes nervous when his new girlfriend, Mona, wants to mail cute Christmas cards.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S4 7
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori go for the gold - but find something even better. Jesse takes a swing at Team Brandori, while T- Money does some dangerous bidding of his own. But when the dust settles, will Scott and Chrissy drive away with the golden prize?

programme.title: Smallville S1 7
programme.desc: Clark must save Pete from being literally devoured by a female classmate, Jodi Melville, whose diet of Kryptonite-affected vegetables causes her to shed weight faster than she can handle.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 06
programme.desc: A miraculous liquid gives Michael the Midas touch in an eyeglass store. And later, Michael trains the new girl at a tanning salon, but things take a horrifying turn when she believes she's killed her first customer.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S3 07
programme.desc: Take The Mirror - Michael's candy shop customers witness a live scorpion get freed from a lollipop, and later, Michael's cocktail invention has one man drunk with envy! And in the big finish, a cursed mirror turns simple reflections into reality.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 9
programme.desc: The gang decides to spend Thanksgiving with Mrs. Wolowitz.

programme.title: Friends S8 12

programme.title: ER S2 18
programme.desc: Greene copes with an understaffed ER on a night shift; a teen overdoses on a toxic chemical; a drive-by shooting injures a baby.

programme.title: Jersey Boys
programme.desc: From Oscar?winning director Clint Eastwood (Million Dollar Baby, Unforgiven) comes the big-screen adaptation of the Tony Award-winning musical. JERSEY BOYS tells the story of four young men from the wrong side of the tracks in New Jersey who came together to form the legendary 1960s rock group The Four Seasons. John Lloyd Young reprises his Tony-winning role of legendary lead singer Frankie Valli, alongside Erich Bergen as the group's co-writer Bob Gaudio. The story of their trials and triumphsare accompanied by the songs that influenced a generation, including "Sherry," Big Girls Don't Cry," Walk Like a Man," and many more --classic hits that are now being embraced by a new generation of fans through the musical that's been running on Broadway for more than eight years.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: Taking place in a dystopian Australia in the near future, Mad Max tells the story of a highway patrolman cruising the squalid back roads that have become the breeding ground of criminals foraging for gasoline and scraps. When his wife and child meet a grisly end at the hands of a motorcycle gang, Max sets out across the barren wastelands in search of revenge. Written by Cole Matthews

programme.desc: It's a pirate adventure! JJ plays pirates on the high seas, builds a sandcastle & hunts for hidden treasure!

programme.title: Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods have unexpected problems! Jeff meets a messy guest & Lulu finds a mysterious egg that cracks!

programme.title: Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: The Minibods learn to play together! Jeff & Bubbles share blocks & Fuse learns to be a team player!

programme.title: Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Join a perfect playtime party with Mia and friends! Play with a magic ball, jump in a ball pit, and dance!

programme.title: Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: It's time for sweet dreams! Mia plays "Ten in a Bed," takes a bubble bath & goes on a rocket ride to the moon!

programme.title: Teamwork Makes the Dream Work!
programme.desc: Buster learns teamwork makes the dream work! He works with his team to win a soccer game & escape a maze!

programme.title: Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Play in a big soccer match with Buster the Bus and learn that teamwork is more important than winning!

programme.title: JJ's Big Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: JJ's on a big animal adventure! He sings with the farm animals, meets a shark family & roars with dinosaurs!

programme.title: Scoring Goals & Celebrations
programme.desc: Score the winning goal in a family soccer game, and then celebrate with a super fast freeze dance party!

programme.title: Fun Facts About The World!
programme.desc: Blippi learns fun facts about the world! He discovers how erasers work & why some animals are nocturnal!

programme.title: Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Blippi explores wonders of the world! He climbs Mt. Everest, dives underwater & blasts off to the moon!

programme.title: Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Blippi makes fun nature discoveries! He learns why islands don't float & how ants walk in a straight line!

programme.title: Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Learn to play soccer with Baby John! Practice your kicks, score a big goal, and see why sharing is caring.

programme.title: A Magical Day of Make-Believe!
programme.desc: It's a magical day of make-believe! Baby John & Manny are farmers & Jill becomes a mermaid!

programme.title: Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: It's a creative farm adventure! Ella brings school to the barn, makes delicious jam & does some stargazing!

programme.title: Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: Let's sing, dance & play on the farm! The friends learn the ABCs, dance & have a splash competition!

programme.title: Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Compete for the Sports Cup with JJ and his animal friends! Race go-karts, build a box car, and never give up.

programme.title: Race to the Goal: Football & Sprints
programme.desc: Race to the finish line with Cody and friends! Compete in a soccer match and a fast-paced sprint to the end.

programme.title: Taking on the Baddest Baddies in Town!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle take on the baddest baddies! They stop robot versions of themselves & an evil Orphle!

programme.title: Tiny Heroes, Giant-Sized Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle are tiny heroes on giant adventures! They rescue a hamster from a maze & save a shrunken whale!

programme.title: Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Daniel cause chaos all over town! They have a wild supermarket chase & a messy picnic!

programme.title: Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo faces squirrel trouble & other wacky problems, like a ghost in the house & a malfunctioning music mode!

programme.title: Buster’s Big Football Match
programme.desc: Play in a big soccer match with Buster the Bus and learn that teamwork is more important than winning!

programme.title: Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning & growing! He overcomes his fear of the carwash & learns the importance of dental health!

programme.title: The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Gecko is on the ultimate rescue missions! He saves Eric from a storm & stops a rocket-powered truck!

programme.title: The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Win the football championship with Gecko! Fix broken vehicles and teach Weasel that cheaters never win.

programme.desc: A spider escapes from an isolated Arizona desert laboratory experimenting in gigantism and grows to tremendous size as it wreaks havoc on the local inhabitants.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: When risk-averse Reuben Feffer's bride dumps him on their honeymoon, his life is thrown completely off track, until, a chance encounter with Polly, an adventure craving, childhood friend.

programme.desc: Paul Newman and Julie Andrews star in Alfred Hitchcock's stunning tale of international espionage, mistaken identities and terrifying secrets during the Cold War.

programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder occurs, and the suspects are killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy spanning two generations.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Jennifer moves into a new apartment after leaving her abusive husband. As she starts life anew, something keeps biting her when she sleeps, leading her to be sleep deprived, paranoid and paralyzed with fear of the unseen.

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: 3AM - The Campus
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Ten Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Amy gets bitten by a rabid bat during her last graveyard shift as a veteran punk rock disc jockey. When a storm traps Amy, her mysterious replacement and an anxious staff inside their small-town radio station, reality starts to distort as they go deeper into the graveyard shift…

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A suspect is interrogated about a shocking and elaborate hoax; an NFL Hall of Famer breaks the law and pays the price; a murder suspect reveals the truth about the disappearance of his one-time girlfriend.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A teen couple must answer for a father's murder; a wife tries to explain why she was caught arranging to have her husband killed; the truth about the shocking death of a pregnant woman comes to light.

programme.title: Hoarders (S14)
programme.desc: Marjorie's husband, Irv, has recently been diagnosed with Parkinson's Disease and has already taken two dangerous falls in the house where the EMTs could not get to him.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: An argument between former NFL player Travis Rudolph and his ex-girlfriend escalates into a gunfight with her brother and his friends.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old struggling to make it on her own goes missing, her family kicks into high gear to find her.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died
programme.desc: During a welfare check, authorities discover a man has been living with the mummified bodies of his family. Pathologists cannot determine if they died naturally or if something nefarious occurred.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder in the Bayou
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: In the chaos after a car crash, a veteran shoots out the tire of another driver's vehicle. Now he is facing up to 20 years in prison. Will a jury decide his actions were justified or reckless?

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: A once-quiet farming community is rocked when one of their own is found brutally murdered. For nearly a year, police struggle to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: The search for a missing priest leads detectives on a multi-state manhunt for a suspect who may be the only person with the answers to his whereabouts.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After the dismembered remains of a missing woman are found in a freezer, investigators uncover a love triangle and a murderous conspiracy to conceal the truth.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A man arrested at sea tries to swim away from police; a man wearing a blue bonnet steals baby formula; a mom goes to extreme measures with a housemate and is arrested for assault.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A hyped-up man goes toe-to-toe with police; a woman flips off fellow drivers while dancing in the street; a pilot is arrested for allegedly stealing a plane; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: The family of Miya Marcano share the agonising details of what happened around the beautiful 19-year-old's disappearance.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: the Series
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
